title: Rainzy's Utilities
description: Various Utilities that are still 'Vanilla' and very handy for multiplayer servers!
body:
## This adds:
Various tools I use to help with projects, multiplayer servers, and just overall quality of life. More useful tools to come!

### Including:
- Waypoint Stand - Armor stand that transmits a Waypoint, as long as the chunk is loaded
- Invisible Item Frame recipe
- Invisible Glow Item Frames
- Shard of Youth - Make a mob a baby forever (purely cosmetic in most cases)
- Shard of Aging - Undo the Shard of Youth (will take about 5 minutes for the baby to grow back into an adult)

All of these items are craftable, and every item can be granted to a player with a function command (with permissions, of course.)

## Crafting:
Recipes are unlocked in your Recipe Book upon collecting the key ingredient for each item;
- Amethyst
- Phantom Membrane
- Armor Stand
